description: Goal: build Compiler2 side-by-side from northstar.html while keeping the current compiler as oracle. Signal: contract tests and trace runs prove reachable facts, absent facts, retractions, quiet closure boundaries, lazy pull-through, and artifact boundaries. Strategy: copy/adapt only the pieces needed into the new module tree, one ticket/commit at a time, and stop to correct the data model whenever the trace shows the engine lying about its own work.
title: Compiler2: build the incremental fact compiler spine
